title: Josephine Psencik, 87, of Temple and formerly of Zabcikville died Saturday, March 7

title: Youth kills minor cousin to ‘teach his mother a lesson’
description: A 22-year-old man allegedly murdered his five-year-old cousin in Mohan Garden to "teach his mother a lesson" over family disputes. The accused, Ravi Kumar, confessed to strangling and slitting the child's throat, then hiding the body. He initially claimed to have found the body.

title: SEX WEEK – Better Than Sex: A Cappella Concert Wows
description: Friday, March 6 posed a bit of a dilemma for Bates students, having to choose between the women’s basketball NESCAC championship game and the much beloved Sex Week A Cappella concert. title: Why did Bradie Tennell withdraw from the 2026 World Championships? US figure skater addresses retirement rumours
description: Bradie Tennell has reassured fans that she is not retiring from figure skating after choosing to skip the 2026 World Championships in Prague. The American skater addressed the rumours through Instagram, explaining that the decision was personal and not related to injury. Tennell said she will still support Team USA while continuing her journey in the sport.

title: Johnson and Davidson score 15 each, Clemson beats Georgia Tech 79-76
description: Butta Johnson and Nick Davidson each scored 15 points and Clemson rallied in the second half to beat Georgia Tech 79-76 on Saturday in a regular-season finale.
